articles.title: Doing this throughout life may cut Alzheimer’s risk by 38%

articles.title: Lonely people have worse memory but don’t decline faster, study finds

articles.title: Your nose could detect Alzheimer’s years before symptoms begin

articles.title: Scientists say we’ve been treating Alzheimer’s all wrong

articles.title: Scientists discover hidden gut trigger behind ALS and dementia

articles.title: Embryonic Pathways Found to Balance the Adult Mind
articles.excerpt: Researchers discovered that a signaling pathway used in brain development is repurposed in adulthood to balance behavioral persistence and flexibility.

articles.title: How AI “Brain States” Decode Reality
articles.excerpt: A new study reveals that AI models with over 2 billion parameters develop mathematical "brain states" that distinguish between possible and impossible events.

articles.title: Early Imaginative Play Predicts Better Mental Health

articles.title: Midlife Fitness Delays Chronic Disease by Years
articles.excerpt: Researchers tracking 24,500 adults found that midlife fitness delays the onset of chronic illness by at least 1.5 years, prioritizing quality of life over just longevity.

articles.title: The Cellular Roots of Mental Illness
articles.excerpt: Researchers developed PhysMAP, an AI tool that identifies specific neuron types in electrical brain recordings to help treat psychiatric "circuitopathies."

articles.title: Scientists Discover How Seeds “Hear” the Weather
